## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)

## Checklist

- [ ] `composer check` passes (Pint, PHPStan level 7 + strict, Pest)
- [ ] Added / updated tests
- [ ] Added a `## [Unreleased]` entry to `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `docs/` if behavior changed
- [ ] Verified the installed output for affected stack(s) (inertia-vue / inertia-react / blade / none)
